sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47985" key="qeatrokopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεᾱτρο-κοπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n47985.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">courting of applause</tr_>, in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
